name: Heartiley Battery
overview: Sofia, a brilliant but emotionally guarded scientist, believes love is nothing more than biology. After witnessing her parents' relationship fall apart, she invents a device called the Love Meter to prove that true love can be measured.

trailers.title: Heartiley Battery | Official Trailer | Tamil ZEE5 Original | Guru Lakshman, Padine K | Pre Dec 16th
